Overview

Get to know Dynamics 365

Learn more about our solutions and products across sales, marketing, customer service, finance, supply chain, and operations.

What is Dynamics 365?

Become more data-driven and innovative with agentic apps for sales, service, finance, and supply chain operations.
Explore Dynamics 365

Take a guided tour

Get a closer look at how to improve specific business processes with Dynamics 365 apps.
Start your tour

Find the right plan for your business needs by exploring the different options for each Dynamics 365 app.

Solutions

Move from a system of record to a system of action

  • Enhance customer relationships across sales, marketing, and service with an agentic CRM solution.
    Explore agentic CRM
  • Reinvent operations, enhance productivity, and gain a competitive edge with the power of an agentic ERP solution.
    Explore agentic ERP
  • Grow your revenue by using AI and real-time insights to understand customers, personalize journeys, and close more deals.
    Explore agentic sales
  • Create more lasting customer connections at every touchpoint while improving team processes and productivity with AI.
    Explore agentic service

Agents

Explore business process agents in Dynamics 365

Discover how the right agents can transform the way your team gets work done.

Accelerate revenue with prebuilt and custom sales agents

Boost your team’s productivity by providing a fully agentic customer engagement journey from lead qualification to deal close and beyond.
Dynamics 365 Sales

Sales Qualification Agent

Free sellers’ time by prioritizing and engaging leads with an always-on AI agent.
Learn more
Dynamics 365 Sales

Sales Close Agent

Autonomously analyze deals to equip your sellers with insights they need to win. Now in preview.
Watch the demo Learn more
Dynamics 365 Business Central

Sales Order Agent

Streamline order creation and fulfillment to help teams move faster from quote to cash with an AI-powered agent.
Watch the demo Learn more
Dynamics 365 Sales

Sales Research Agent

Get answers to complex sales and operations questions and turn raw data into actionable insights.
Watch the demo Learn more
Copilot Studio

Custom sales agents

Create custom sales agents tailored to your workflows and data using Copilot Studio.
Explore use cases Learn more
Back to Agents - Sales tab section

Elevate your service with prebuilt and custom agents

Increase efficiency and cut costs using autonomous agents to address emerging issues, uncover knowledge, and automate tasks.
See the agents in action
Dynamics 365 Customer Service

Customer Intent Agent

Enable evergreen self-service by discovering intents from customer conversations across channels. Also available in Dynamics 365 Contact Center.
Learn more
Dynamics 365 Customer Service

Customer Knowledge Management Agent

Keep knowledge articles perpetually current by uncovering insights from case notes and other artifacts. Also available in Dynamics 365 Contact Center.
Learn more
Dynamics 365 Customer Service

Case Management Agent

Automate the case lifecycle to reduce handle time and alleviate the burden of manual tasks on service reps.
Learn more
Dynamics 365 Customer Service

Quality Evaluation Agent

Monitor service quality across customer interactions—from service reps to self-service agents.
Read the blog Learn more
Dynamics 365 Field Service

Scheduling Operations Agent

Equip dispatchers with an agent to optimize technician schedules as conditions change throughout the day. Now in preview.
Watch the demo Learn more
Copilot Studio

Custom service agents

Create custom service agents tailored to your workflows and data using Copilot Studio.
Explore use cases Learn more
Back to Agents - Service & CCaaS tab section

Transform finance and operations with prebuilt and custom agents

Streamline operations and decisions using agents that help orchestrate supplier engagement, optimize resource planning, and enable timely billing.
Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management

Procurement Agent

Manage supplier communications autonomously to confirm order delivery and proactively address risks, preempting costly delays. Now in preview.
Read the blog Learn more
Dynamics 365 Business Central

Payables Agent

Help automate invoice processing to reduce manual effort with an AI-powered agent.
Watch the demo Learn more
Dynamics 365 Finance

Account Reconciliation Agent

Match and clear transactions between ledgers autonomously to help finance teams close their books with less manual work. Now in preview.
Watch the demo Learn more
Dynamics 365 Project Operations

Time, Expense, and Approvals Agents

Manage time and expense entry and approval autonomously to ensure projects stay on track and within budget. Now in preview.
Read the blog Learn more

Custom finance and operation agents

Create custom finance and operations agents tailored to your workflows and data using Copilot Studio.
